steps.title: Identify the structure on each side
steps.content: To the left of the blank we have the noun phrase fellow OECD member. To the right, beginning with the blank, we would add a noun that renames that phrase and then the specific country name Lithuania.

steps.title: Apply the appositive rule
steps.content: A comma sets off a nonessential appositive that renames the preceding noun, so we need nation, before Lithuania. The other three choices either use wrong punctuation for an appositive or create a run‑on/fragment. That matches choice A — A is correct.
